title: Forza Horizon 5

notes:
Hey everyone,
I’m trying to get Forza Horizon 5 running on CachyOS, but I can’t get past the Xbox login. The login window opens, I sign in, it closes instantly, and Forza says I’m not signed in.

Here’s what I’ve tried so far:

Proton Experimental

Proton Hotfix

Proton GE (several versions)

Proton CachyOS

Clearing Steam’s web data

Deleting the Forza prefix and letting Proton recreate it

Still the same issue every time.
title: Forza Horizon 5

notes: The game opens but I am unable to get past the main menu screen without it prompting me for an Xbox login. I am able to enter my email and password but once I click to sign in, it just boots me out and won't progress any further than this.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 19.1.7, DRM 3.59, 6.12.13-200.fc41.x86_64)
notes:
If you get the error, that the installation path is too long, you'll need to move FH5 into a directory with a shorter name. I just installed Steam via dnf and solved it that way.



I've tried it and tried it but can't seem to get it working.

Maybe it will help you, I tried the following:

I've changed the crypto policy with this:
```
`sudo update-crypto-policies --set LEGACY`
```

I've tried these launch options:
```
`gamemoderun %command% PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 DXVK_HUD=1 PROTON_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1`
```

```
`gamemoderun %command% PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 DXVK_HUD=1`
```

I switched to experimental, GE-Proton 10-25, GE-Proton 10-26, GE-Proton  9-22, GE-Proton  10-15 and all Steam provided Proton versions starting from 3.16-9

As also said before, I installed Microsoft Edge with the hopes of having a cookie and get past the login, but It couldn't install because it's not supported for this (GE-Proton 10-25) Windows version.

I also tried to disable the steam overlay which worked in Halo MCC. 

Nothing worked sadly.
